landing.title: Sadhana Pro
landing.subtitle: Sadhana tracker and chart — a tracker for spiritual practice, meditation, and habits
landing.description: Sadhana Pro is a powerful and flexible sadhana (daily spiritual practice) diary that helps you track your daily practices, habits, and meditation. You can track your activities in convenient tables or monitor your progress on visual graphs. The app is ideal for both regular spiritual practice and systematically tracking your daily tasks and habits. With Sadhana Pro, you can consciously develop your spiritual discipline.
landing.freeForever: Free forever · No credit card required

keyFeatures.title: Key Features
keyFeatures.customisableDescription: Add your own fields with types like numbers, text, boolean, time of day, and duration.
keyFeatures.reportsDescription: Build custom reports and visualize multiple metrics together over time.
keyFeatures.offlineDescription: Enter your data even without an internet connection.
keyFeatures.installDescription: Add it to your phone's home screen for a native app-like experience.
keyFeatures.shareDescription: Share the link to the graphs with your mentors.
keyFeatures.groupDescription: Join groups, track together, and see each other's data in table format.
keyFeatures.dataDescription: Import and export your data as CSV files for backup and analysis.

preview.carouselDescription: Browse all 6 screens of Sadhana Pro and see how easy it is to track any spiritual practice.
preview.slide1: Track your daily sadhana — japa, wake time, reading, and more
preview.slide2: Works offline — syncs when you're back online
preview.slide3: Add any practice with custom data types
preview.slide4: Visual graphs across multiple metrics over time
preview.slide5: Group tracking — see your sangha's progress together
preview.slide6: Built-in support with video guides and direct contact

trackAnythingText: Use Sadhana Pro to track your daily sadhana, yoga practices, meditation, journaling, reading, or any personal habits. With full offline mode and phone installation support, your data stays with you wherever you go.

meta.title: Sadhana Tracker, Journal & Chart — Track Your Spiritual Practice, Meditation, and Habits
meta.description: Sadhana Pro is your customizable daily sadhana journal, chart, and spiritual practice tracker. Record your progress in meditation, yoga, chanting, or daily habits with reports, offline mode, graph sharing, and CSV export.
meta.keywords: sadhana journal, sadhana diary, sadhana tracker, daily sadhana chart, sadhana log, digital sadhana notebook, sadhana chart, spiritual journal, meditation tracker, yoga tracker, mantra diary, spiritual practice tracker, habit tracker, customizable tracker, offline sadhana app, sadhana pro, spiritual growth tracker, group tracking, csv export, installable web app
